Strting query: Please edit this agentic workflow json template:
user query: Change the model used for each agent to gpt-4o-mini. Also, please add a termination condition that checks if the task is completed.

description: Agentic workflow to fetch satellite images, run a detector, and zoom the map for Athens International Airport, Greece.
label: Athens Airport Image Processing Workflow

participants.description: Agent to fetch xView1 images from a specified area.
participants.label: ImageFetcherAgent

config.name: ImageFetcher
config.description: Fetches xView1 images from specified coordinates in Athens
config.system_message: You will fetch satellite images from Athens International Airport.
config.tool_call_summary_format: Fetched images from the xView1 dataset.

participants.description: Agent to run Swin-L detector on images.
participants.label: SwinLDetectorAgent

config.name: SwinLDetector

model_client.description: Client for running the Swin-L detector
model_client.label: SwinLClient

model_context.description: Context for the Swin-L detection agent
model_context.label: SwinLDetectorContext

config.description: Processes fetched images and runs the Swin-L object detection model.
config.system_message: You will analyze the fetched images with the Swin-L detector.

participants.description: Agent to zoom the map at the specified location.
participants.label: MapZoomAgent

config.name: MapZoomer

model_context.description: Context for the map zooming agent
model_context.label: MapZoomContext

config.description: Zooms the map view to the location of Athens International Airport.
config.system_message: You will zoom the map to the area of Athens International Airport, Greece.
config.tool_call_summary_format: Zoomed the map to Athens International Airport.

termination_condition.description: Ends the workflow when all agents have completed their tasks.
termination_condition.label: CompletionCondition
